PSDrives.Name: Orch1
PSDrives.Description: Non-Conf App settings. In Orchestrator admin page: create an external app, add User Scopes of Orchestrator API Access to match or exceed the scopes listed below, and use http://localhost/Temporary_Listen_Addresses as the Redirect URL. In this config: input the Root and the issued App ID.

PSDrives.Name: Orch2
PSDrives.Description: Conf App settings. Note that a Confidential App is relatively insecure. It should be used for unattended script executions, and it is recommended to specify only the necessary scopes. In the Orchestrator admin page: create an external app and add App Scopes of Orchestrator API Access to match or exceed the scopes listed below. No Redirect URL is needed. In this config: input the Root, the issued App ID, and App Secret.

PSDrives.Name: Orch3
PSDrives.Description: Username and password settings. This authentication method is deprecated but necessary when connecting to earlier versions of on-premise Orchestrator. Support for OAuth external applications is available starting from version 21.4. Please ensure that you specify YOUR_TENANT at the end of the URL.

PSDrives.Name: Orch4
PSDrives.Description: For the Orchestrator deployed on Azure App Service, specify the Identity Server URL using the `IdentityUrl` key. For the other keys, refer to the OAuth conf or non-conf settings.
